ZLOG_COMPRAS/src/main/java/com/zlogcompr.general_idea: Replaced javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Replaced field injection with constructor injection to follow modern Spring best practices and improve testability.
Refactored controller to use Request/Response DTOs instead of exposing domain entities directly.
Changed base mapping from singular '/api/estoque' to plural '/api/estoques' for REST consistency.
Implemented missing CRUD endpoints (Create, Update, Delete, Batch Create) to complete the resource lifecycle.
Added specific endpoints for stock movement operations (add/remove quantity).
Simplified ResponseEntity construction by removing Optional mapping boilerplate.
Refactor controller to delegate business logic to a service layer and use DTOs instead of exposing entity models directly.
ZLOG_COMPRAS/src/main/java/com/zlogcompr.human_impl: Replaced direct `FornecedorRepository` calls with `FornecedorService` methods and changed method signatures to use `FornecedorRequestDTO` and `FornecedorResponseDTO`.

ZLOG_COMPRAS/src/main/java/com/zlogcompr.general_idea: Add import for Jakarta Validation to enable request body validation.
Add import for Spring Web Server exception handling to improve error responses.
Add import for the new Mapper interface used to convert entities to DTOs.
Add import for the new Service interface.
Add import for the new Request DTO class.
Add import for the new Response DTO class.
Remove unused Optional import as logic is now handled by service/exception throwing.
Remove unused Entity import as controller no longer exposes entities directly.
Remove unused Repository import as controller no longer accesses repository directly.
Switch from field injection to constructor injection for better testability and immutability.
ZLOG_COMPRAS/src/main/java/com/zlogcompr.human_impl: Replaced `@Autowired private FornecedorRepository` with constructor taking `FornecedorService` and `FornecedorMapper`.

ZLOG_COMPRAS/src/main/java/com/zlogcompr.general_idea: Update PUT endpoint to accept Request DTO and return Response DTO via service.

ZLOG_COMPRAS/src/main/java/com/zlogcompr.general_idea: Replaced javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3/JDK 21.

ZLOG_COMPRAS/src/main/java/com/zlogcompr.general_idea: Refactored controller to use Request/Response DTOs instead of exposing domain entities directly in the API contract.
Changed HTTP method annotations from PUT to PATCH for partial updates (approve/reject/conclude) to follow RESTful conventions.
Replaced verbose new ResponseEntity<>(body, status) calls with fluent ResponseEntity.ok() and .noContent() builders.
Removed Optional wrapper from service return type and simplified controller logic to assume service handles existence checks or throws exceptions.
Removed direct dependency on ProcessoCompraService from the controller, delegating approval logic to OrcamentoService.
Removed the endpoint for fetching budgets by solicitation ID, likely consolidating this logic elsewhere or deprecating it.
Added a new endpoint for creating budgets in batch (lote).
Added a new endpoint for deleting a budget.
Added a new endpoint for rejecting a budget.
Added a new endpoint for concluding a budget.
Replaced javax.validation import with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Switched from field injection (@Autowired) to constructor injection for better testability and immutability.
Introduced a mapper to convert domain entities to DTOs, decoupling the API response structure from the internal model.
Updated the create endpoint to accept a RequestDTO and return a ResponseDTO instead of raw entities.
Updated the list endpoint to return a list of ResponseDTOs mapped from entities.
Updated the get-by-id endpoint to return a ResponseDTO and handle missing resources via service layer exception or null check.
Updated the update endpoint to accept an UpdateDTO and return a ResponseDTO.
